scope: End-to-end LayoutLMv3 training pipeline validation on first-party synthetic data; not a real-world or cross-template benchmark.

model.reason_gradient_checkpointing_disabled: LayoutLMv3ForTokenClassification does not support it in the installed Transformers runtime.

data.known_limitation: All records use one fictitious template family; results must not be used as a generalization, fairness, calibration, or production-quality claim.

next_gate: Generate multiple held-out template and capture families; report entity micro/macro F1, field exact match, calibration, cross-template transfer, and inference latency before promoting any LayoutLMv3 release.
